problem.summary: Compare repeated ordinary kernel launches against captured HIP Graph replay for a tiny fixed workflow. This is a template-only scaffold for launch-bound workloads; no timing claim is attached.
outputs: y[i] contains the result of a repeated axpy-style workflow
constraints: Fixed allocation and shape during graph replay
Measure graph instantiation separately from graph launch
Report timing-only unless profiler artifacts are attached

verification.method: Compare graph replay output with ordinary-launch output for the same inputs before collecting timings.

curation.notes: Use this when launch overhead, not kernel body throughput, is the hypothesis. Attach hardware and build metadata to any future timing-only result.
